steps.t: The Brehur and Brehures can be found in the Brenin's Hall in Lhanuch. Glynn Brenin has asked you to speak with his advisors about the words of Anirin …
Halbarad is among the huts on the western side of Lhanuch. You have spoken with the Brehur and Brehures of Lhanuch and should return to Halbarad with …
Nona is in the north-eastern corner of the Dunlending village of Lhanuch. Halbarad has remembered that you did not bring his refusal to Nona and wants…
